## Server Overview

What service, API, or data source should this MCP server expose?

## Use Cases

Describe the real-world scenarios or workflows this server would enable for AI agents/clients.

## API / Data Source Details

- **API name / URL:** 
- **Authentication required:** 
- **Official docs:** 
- **Rate limits or restrictions:** 

## Proposed Tools / Resources

| Tool / Resource Name | Description |
|----------------------|-------------|
| `tool_name` | What it does |

## Priority

- [ ] Critical - blocking a real workflow
- [ ] High - frequently needed
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - future consideration

## Would you like to contribute this server?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to open a PR
- [ ] No, I'd like someone else to implement it
